title: critoniopsis cotopaxensis
intro: Critoniopsis cotopaxensis, also known as Cotopaxi daisy, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like perennial that is native to the mountainous regions of South America, specifically in Ecuador and Peru, and is known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for relieving digestive issues and reducing stress. Critoniopsis cotopaxensis can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is often used as a natural remedy for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health.
